card.name: Port Pearl Flagship
card.text: Flying, lifelink When Port Pearl Flagship enters, create two 1/1 colorless Thopter creature tokens with flying. Whenever Port Pearl Flagship attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures you control. Crew 2

card.name: Cora, Windwoken
card.text: [+2]: Create an Incursion token. (It's a battle with 2 defense and "When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.") [+1]: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains flying until end of turn. [-2]: Reveal the top four cards of your library. You may put a creature card with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. [-8]: Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control. Those creatures gain flying, vigilance, and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Valus Harbor Flagship
card.text: Flying, vigilance When Valus Harbor Flagship enters, draw two cards, then discard a card. Whenever Valus Harbor Flagship attacks, exile up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. You may cast a copy of it. Crew 2

card.name: Abyssal Scuttler
card.text: Abyssal Scuttler enters tapped with seven stun counters on it. Whenever another Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent you control enters, remove a stun counter from Abyssal Scuttler. When you do, tap up to one target nonland permanent an opponent controls, then put a stun counter on that permanent.

card.name: Onyx Armada Flagship
card.text: Menace, lifelink When Onyx Armada Flagship enters, target opponent exiles a creature they control unless they exile a nonland card from their hand. Whenever Onyx Armada Flagship attacks, defending player loses life equal to the greatest mana value among permanents they control. Crew 2

card.name: Old Rustblade Morris
card.text: Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Whenever a creature token you control dies, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Sun Fleet Flagship
card.text: Menace, trample When Sun Fleet Flagship enters, it deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Whenever Sun Fleet Flagship attacks, it deals 1 damage to each creature and planeswalker defending player controls. Crew 2

card.name: Livewire Trebuchet
card.text: Creatures you control have haste. {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Livewire Trebuchet deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to any target. Activate only during your turn.

card.name: Verdigris Reef Flagship
card.text: Vigilance, trample When Verdigris Reef Flagship enters, mill five cards, then put a land card milled this way onto the battlefield tapped. Whenever Verdigris Reef Flagship attacks, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Crew 2

card.name: Discovery of L'Or
card.text: Lands, artifacts, and creatures you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color." At the beginning of your end step, if there are five colors among spells you cast this turn, draw a card and you gain 5 life.

card.name: Quartermaster Gillo
card.text: First mate — Creature cards in your starting deck have total mana value 80 or greater. (If this card outside the game is your chosen first mate, you may swap it with a card in your opening hand.) Whenever you cast a creature spell, if it doesn't share a name with a creature you control, draw a card.

card.name: Harriet, the Sea's Darling
card.text: First mate — Your starting deck contains an artifact card with each mana value among 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5. (If this card outside the game is your chosen first mate, you may swap it with a card in your opening hand.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may put an artifact card with mana value 5 or less from your hand onto the battlefield. If it's a Vehicle, it gains haste. Put it on the bottom of your library at end of combat. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Hugo, Gold and Glory
card.text: First mate — Your starting deck contains at least thirteen creature cards and at least thirteen instant and/or sorcery cards. (If this card outside the game is your chosen first mate, you may swap it with a card in your opening hand.) If another source you control would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, it deals that much damage plus 2 instead.

card.name: Alma Bristol, Legionette
card.text: First mate — Each creature card in your starting deck is a Zombie card. (If this card outside the game is your chosen first mate, you may swap it with a card in your opening hand.) Other Zombies you control get +1/+1. During each of your turns, you may cast one Zombie spell from your graveyard.

card.name: Usan, Lord of Greensea
card.text: First mate — Your starting deck contains exactly 88 cards. (If this card outside the game is your chosen first mate, you may swap it with a card in your opening hand.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control has base power and toughness 8/8 until end of turn. {8}: Draw three cards.

card.name: Platinum Imperator
card.text: All damage that would be dealt to you and other permanents you control is dealt to Platinum Imperator instead.

card.name: Crain Culls the Three Seas
card.text: Creatures you control dying cause abilities of that creature to trigger as though that creature entered. You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, exile target nonland permanent. You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, each opponent loses 5 life and you gain 5 life. Return up to two target creature cards each with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Molten Brass Dragon
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever Molten Brass Dragon attacks, it innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.) Whenever you play a card from exile, if it's a land, you gain 3 life. Otherwise, Molten Brass Dragon deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Welkin Rayfin
card.text: Flying Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 2/2 colorless Vehicle artifact token with crew 1. Vehicles you control with crew 1 are artifact creatures.

card.name: Sea King Crain
card.text: As Crain enters, for each opponent, create a black Aura Curse enchantment token attached to that player. It has enchant player and "Whenever enchanted player draws a card, this enchantment deals 1 damage to them." [+2]: Draw a card. Each opponent discards a card. [-2]: Destroy target creature. Its controller may draw a card. [-3]: Each player may discard their hand, then draw five cards.

card.name: Mere et Pere
card.text: Vigilance If an ability of a Vehicle you controls triggers, that ability triggers an additional time. Crew 2

card.name: Marbled Custodian
card.text: When Marbled Custodian enters, create a colorless Construct artifact creature token with "This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of artifacts you control." At the beginning of your end step, if an artifact you control entered this turn, you gain 2 life and surveil 1.

card.name: Dashing Freebooter
card.text: Flying When Dashing Freebooter enters, create an Incursion token. (It's a battle with 2 defense and "When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.") If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

card.name: Port Aurora Bureaucrat
card.text: When Port Aurora Bureaucrat enters, create two 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature tokens with flying. {T}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Buoyant Cloudgazer
card.text: When Buoyant Cloudgazer enters, search your library for a Vehicle card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Legendary spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Trial of the Deepbrine
card.text: Whenever a spell or ability an opponent controls causes them to sacrifice one or more nonland permanents or an opponent sacrifices a nonland permanent while paying a cost, draw a card. At the beginning of your end step, exile all graveyards.

card.name: F.S.S. Majesty
card.text: Flying, agile (This creature deals combat damage first as long as it's attacking.) Whenever a Vehicle you control attacks, create a 3/3 white Whale creature token with flying that's tapped and attacking. Crew 3

card.name: Chief Aerialist Florence
card.text: Flash Flying Whenever you draw a card, Florence innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.)

card.name: Jubilant Skyskipper
card.text: Flying, vigilance When Jubilant Skyskipper enters, put target nonland permanent an opponent controls into its owner's library just beneath the top X cards of that library, where X is the number of creatures you control with flying.

card.name: Queen of Cerulean Tides
card.text: Other Merfolk you control get +1/+1. Whenever you attack with three or more Merfolk, add an 8/8 blue Kraken creature token to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)

card.name: Silversea Archfiend
card.text: Whenever Silversea Archfiend enters or attacks, you may cast an instant or sorcery card with mana value 5 or less from your hand or graveyard without paying its mana cost. If that spell would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead. When Silversea Archfiend dies, add a token copy of Silversea Archfiend to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)

card.name: Greensea Euphony
card.text: Enchant creature you control At the beginning of your end step, add a token copy of enchanted creature to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)

card.name: Offshore Assignment
card.text: Exile up to two target creatures you control, then return them to the battlefield under their owners' control. Each of those creatures innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time that creature is tapped.)

card.name: Crain's Soulchaser
card.text: When Crain's Soulchaser enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Whenever Crain's Soulchaser attacks, create a token that's a copy of target nonartifact creature you control except it has decayed. Crew 3

card.name: Dross Refiner
card.text: Whenever you attack, you may pay 1 life. If you do, create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.") {T}: Target opponent loses 3 life unless they sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card. Crew 1

card.name: Moldin' Retreiver
card.text: When Moldin' Retreiver enters, surveil 2. {B}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If you exiled a creature card this way, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Captain Krenshaw Teach
card.text: When Captain Krenshaw Teach enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, draw a card. {B}, {T}: Exile target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature, and it has "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control." Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Unsparing Brute
card.text: Raid — At the beginning of your end step, reveal the top card of your library and put it into your hand. You lose life equal to its mana value. If you attacked this turn, instead each opponent loses life equal to that card's mana value.

card.name: Scour the Heap
card.text: Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle. Raid — If you attacked this turn, you may cast a card with mana value 3 or less from your hand by paying life equal to its mana value rather than paying its mana cost.

card.name: Lurid Designs
card.text: Creature spells you cast cost {2} less to cast. Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, put a decayed counter on it. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Lurching Lubber
card.text: Lurching Lubber can't block. If you would create a Zombie creature token, you may instead return Lurching Lubber from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Madcap Cannoneer
card.text: Menace, haste Whenever Madcap Cannoneer deals combat damage to a player, exile the top card of that player's library. As long as Madcap Cannoneer is tapped, you may play that card from exile, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast that spell.

card.name: Giz-Whiz Gremlins
card.text: Whenever Giz-Whiz Gremlins attacks, you may discard your hand. If you discarded one or more cards this way, Giz-Whiz Gremlins innovates three times. (Exile the top three cards of your library face down. You may look at them at any time, and you may play them at any time this creature is tapped.) You may cast innovated spells as though they have flash.

card.name: Veteran Calibrator
card.text: When Veteran Calibrator enters, create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.") {1}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Return target artifact card with mana value 5 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Voltage Infusion
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a Cog. Exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. You may cast a copy of that card. When you do, if you paid this spell's additional cost, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Horizon Line Frigate
card.text: Whenever Horizon Line Frigate or another Vehicle you control enters, if you cast it from your hand, discover 3. (Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 3 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.) Crew 2

card.name: Blast Furnace
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, target creature you control innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time that creature is tapped.) {T}: Blast Furnace deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Tradewinds Tracer
card.text: Haste Whenever Tradewinds Tracer becomes crewed by creatures with total power 4 or greater, it becomes a 4/4 Dragon with flying until end of turn. Crew 1. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Tenth Gear
card.text: Enchant creature or Vehicle you control Enchanted permanent gets +10/+10 and is a Vehicle artifact with crew 3 and it loses all other card types.

card.name: Sworn Reefguard
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create an Incursion token. (It's a battle with 2 defense and "When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.")

card.name: Anomalgae
card.text: When Anomalgae enters, you may destroy target artifact or enchantment an opponent controls. If you do, its controller creates a 2/2 colorless Vehicle artifact token with flying and crew 1. Whenever an artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Anomalgae.

card.name: Kanta, Clockwork Raja
card.text: When Kanta enters, create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.") {1}{G}, {T}: You may put a creature or Vehicle card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Bane of the Seas
card.text: Challenge (This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.) Other Krakens, Leviathans, Octopi, and Serpents you control have challenge.

card.name: Septech Assembly Works
card.text: Whenever you create a token, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn. {4}{G}{G}: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control.

card.name: The Hollow Colossus
card.text: Whenever The Hollow Colossus attacks, you may sacrifice a creature that crewed it this turn. If you do, search your library for a creature card with mana value equal to the 1 plus sacrificed creature's mana value, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Crew 1

card.name: Pearl Isle Sirens
card.text: When Pearl Isle Sirens enters, add a 3/3 white Whale creature token with flying to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 blue Fish creature token.

card.name: H.S.S. Tempest
card.text: Flash Flying When H.S.S. Tempest enters, exile up to one target creature an opponent controls, then create a token that's a copy of that permanent except it has decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Crew 4

card.name: Deepbrine Trawler
card.text: When Deepbrine Trawler enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) {T}, Sacrifice three other creatures: You gain 3 life and draw a card. Each opponent loses 3 life, then sacrifices a creature unless they discard a card.

card.name: Baleful Squall
card.text: Return each nontoken creature to its owner's hand, then each player discards two cards.

card.name: Haughty Mutineer
card.text: Raid — At the beginning of your end step, you may discard a card. If you do, exile cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. If you attacked this turn, you may cast that card without paying its mana cost. If you don't, put it into your hand.

card.name: Greaseworks Automaton
card.text: Menace You may cast Greaseworks Automaton from your graveyard by sacrificing a creature in addition to its other costs. If you do, when Greaseworks Automaton enters, it innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.)

card.name: New Currents Tracker
card.text: Vigilance, haste {T}: Target land you control becomes a 4/4 Elemental creature with haste until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: Pentech Welder
card.text: Whenever Pentech Welder attacks, create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.") Sacrifice five Cogs: Pentech Welder deals 5 damage to any target.

card.name: New Charter Commodore
card.text: Vigilance When New Charter Commodore enters, create an Incursion token. (It's a battle with 2 defense and "When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.") Whenever you put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Coquille, the Risen Isle
card.text: Flying Whenever Coquille attacks while saddled, put two +1/+1 counters on another target attacking creature you control. That creature gains flying until end of turn. Saddle 2

card.name: Schematic Prodigy
card.text: Menace, deathtouch Whenever Schematic Prodigy deals combat damage to a player, they lose life equal to the number of artifacts you control and you gain that much life.

card.name: Bandit's Cloudcutter
card.text: Flying, lifelink When Bandit's Cloudcutter enters, each player chooses a creature they control, then sacrifices the rest. Crew 3

card.name: Sea Queen's Conch
card.text: When Sea Queen's Conch enters, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token with "{T}: Add {G}." {2}, {T}: Mill two cards. When you do, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Activate only if you created a token this turn.

card.name: Rancorous Puppeteer
card.text: When Rancorous Puppeteer enters, create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.") {1}, {T}: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Coral Matron
card.text: Whenever a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent you control enters, draw a card. {T}: Target Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent you control gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Release the Krakens
card.text: Add eight 8/8 blue Kraken creature tokens to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)

card.name: Foolhardy Looter
card.text: Haste {T}: Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.

card.name: Port Terra Overseer
card.text: At the beginning of your second main phase, target creature you control innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.)

card.name: The Glory of Port Rose
card.text: Other creatures you control get +1/+0. Exhaust — {4}{R}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on The Glory of Port Rose. It deals damage to any target equal to the number of creatures you control and you gain that much life. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.) Crew 2

card.name: Sun Fleet Lieutenant
card.text: When Sun Fleet Lieutenant enters, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a Vehicle card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Whenever Sun Fleet Lieutenant becomes tapped, target creature or Vehicle you control gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Steamsurge Forge
card.text: Indestructible (Effects that say "destroy" don't destroy this artifact.) {T}: Create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control."

card.name: Dieu-de-Fer Navire
card.text: {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Whenever Dieu-de-Fer Navire attacks, you may pay {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}. If you do, draw three cards, then Dieu-de-Fer Navire deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life. Crew 3

card.name: Second Spire Bibliotech
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a token, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn — • Draw a card. • Create a 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature token with flying. • Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: New Charter Dreadnought
card.text: Flying When New Charter Dreadnought enters or attacks, exile target permanent. Crew 2

card.name: King Kraken's Lair
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {8}, {T}: Discover 8. Activate only if you have no cards in your hand and only as a sorcery. (To discover 8, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 8 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Port Plenty Admiral
card.text: Whenever Port Plenty Admiral becomes tapped, another target creature or Vehicle you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Skystream Lookout
card.text: Creatures you control with flying get +1/+1. Exhaust — {2}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Skystream Lookout. Add a 3/3 white Whale creature token with flying to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary. Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Zephyr Trailblazer
card.text: When Zephyr Trailblazer enters, create a 2/2 colorless Vehicle artifact token with flying and crew 1.

card.name: Anemoscope Gull
card.text: Flash Flying When Anemoscope Gull enters, exile up to one target Vehicle, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. If you don't control that Vehicle, it loses all abilities until end of turn.

card.name: Valiant Privateer
card.text: Double strike When Valiant Privateer enters, create an Incursion token. (It's a battle with 2 defense and "When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.")

card.name: Studied Gizmotorist
card.text: Whenever Studied Gizmotorist enters or dies, create a 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature token with flying.

card.name: Dancing Mantas
card.text: Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on a creature you control, create a 1/1 blue Fish creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Migratory Whitefin
card.text: Flying When Migratory Whitefin enters, add two 3/3 white Whale creature tokens with flying to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)

card.name: Ballasted Cruiser
card.text: Flying When Ballasted Cruiser enters, search your library for an artifact or creature card with mana value 2 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Auto-Rigger Transit
card.text: Flying Whenever another artifact you control enters, Auto-Rigger Transit becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. This ability triggers only once each turn. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Rest for the Weary
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. Its controller creates two Cog tokens. (They're artifacts with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.")

card.name: Greensea Stalwart
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Some Assembly Required
card.text: Create two 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature tokens with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control."

card.name: Crain's Bidding
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Create an Incursion token. (It's a battle with 2 defense and "When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.")

card.name: Best Laid Plans
card.text: Raid — At the beginning of your end step, if you attacked this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Sunken Minstrel
card.text: When Sunken Minstrel enters, mill two cards. {T}, Exile two cards from your graveyard: Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Helmsman Garriway
card.text: Whenever one or more Zombies you control deal combat damage to a player, look at that many cards from the top of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Silversea Empath
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, create two 1/1 blue Fish creature tokens.

card.name: Kelp Dweller
card.text: {T}: Surveil 1.

card.name: Eccentric Aeronaut
card.text: Flying Whenever Eccentric Aeronaut becomes untapped, it innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.)

card.name: Pelagic Chainer
card.text: When Pelagic Chainer enters, create two 2/2 black Zombie creature tokens with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) {1}, Tap two untapped Zombies you control: Tap target creature or Vehicle.

card.name: Buoyant Bowhead
card.text: Flash This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature and/or Vehicle you control with flying. Flying

card.name: Maelstrom Leviathan
card.text: When Maelstrom Leviathan enters, return each creature with power 2 or less to its owner's hand.

card.name: Colossal Wake
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {2} or behold a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent. (To behold, choose a permanent you control with that type or reveal a card with that type from your hand.) Tap target creature and put eight stun counters on it.

card.name: Abrupt Teleportation
card.text: Target creature you control innovates, then phases out. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time that creature is tapped. Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: Calibrate the Cogworks
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}. • Draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Whirlwind Pinions
card.text: Enchant creature When Whirlwind Pinions enters, add a 3/3 white Whale creature token with flying to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.) Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying.

card.name: Tidal Tremors
card.text: Return up to two target creatures to their owners' hands. Add an 8/8 blue Kraken creature token to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)

card.name: Nonatech Foundry
card.text: Whenever Nonatech Foundry or another artifact you control enters, create a 1/1 colorless Thopter creature token with flying. This ability triggers only once each turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Tinkerer's Trial
card.text: Search your library for an artifact card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Untap up to three target artifacts and/or lands.

card.name: Upgrade Drone
card.text: Flying {2}{B}, Exile Upgrade Drone from your graveyard: Create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control." Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Devious Shankleg
card.text: Other Zombies you control get +1/+0. Other Pirates you control have menace.

card.name: Gravehowl Enforcer
card.text: Sacrifice a token: Gravehowl Enforcer gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy this creature.)

card.name: Contract Bronzesmith
card.text: Whenever a creature dies, create a Cog token. This ability triggers only once each turn. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.") {1}{B}, {T}: Target creature you control gains deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Blacksea Murkrouser
card.text: Menace Whenever Blacksea Murkrouser or another nontoken Zombie you control enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature tokens with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Triptech Bounty Hunter
card.text: Flying When Triptech Bounty Hunter enters, create a Cog token, When you do, target creature an opponent controls gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of artifacts you control. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.")

card.name: Deepbrine Warden
card.text: Raid — When Deepbrine Warden enters, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. If you attacked this turn, return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand instead.

card.name: Board of Directors
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Draw a card.

card.name: Army of the Drowned
card.text: Create ten 2/2 black Zombie creature tokens with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Dead Cell Protocol
card.text: Surveil 1, then draw a card and you lose 1 life. Up to one target creature you control innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time that creature is tapped.)

card.name: Swashbuckle
card.text: Up to one target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Up to one target creature gets -0/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Go For the Throat
card.text: Destroy target nonartifact creature.

card.name: Necrotic Ketch
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gains "When this creature dies, draw a card and each opponent loses 2 life" until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Hydraulic Grinder
card.text: Raid — When Hydraulic Grinder enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature. If you attacked this turn, instead each opponent sacrifices a creature with the greatest mana value among creatures they control. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Dredge Up
card.text: Return target creature or Vehicle card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It can't block this turn.

card.name: Sparkplug Recycler
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, Sparkplug Recycler deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Galvanic Ruffian
card.text: When Galvanic Ruffian dies, create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.")

card.name: Hydraulics Specialist
card.text: Whenever Hydraulics Specialist becomes tapped, target creature or Vehicle you control gets +2/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Plucky Hijacker
card.text: Haste Whenever Plucky Hijacker attacks, you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, create a 4/4 colorless Vehicle artifact token with crew 1.

card.name: Company Pathfinder
card.text: {T}: Add {R}{R}. {4}{R}{R}: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Grizzled Gunner
card.text: Raid — When Grizzled Gunner enters, if you attacked this turn, Grizzled Gunner deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Leading-Edge Thugs
card.text: When Leading-Edge Thugs enters, it innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.) Spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {2} less to cast.

card.name: Spireroost Slagkite
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever Spireroost Slagkite enters or attacks, create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.")

card.name: Pillage and Plunder
card.text: Pillage and Plunder deals 2 damage to each creature. Raid — If you attacked this turn, Pillage and Plunder deals 2 damage to each creature you don't control instead.

card.name: Kinetic Strike
card.text: Target creature you control innovates, then deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time that creature is tapped.)

card.name: Spear Barrage
card.text: Spear Barrage deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If you control a Vehicle creature, Spear Barrage deals 6 damage to that permanent instead.

card.name: Mortuary Alchemy
card.text: Choose up to one target creature or Vehicle you control and up to one target creature or Vehicle you don't control. For each permanent chosen this way, create a token that's a copy of it except it has haste and decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Gliding Catboat
card.text: Agile (This creature deals combat damage first as long as it's attacking.) Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Thunderlugger
card.text: {T}: Target creature or Vehicle can't block this turn. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Freefire Brigantine
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Eelgrass Trapper
card.text: Deathtouch When Eelgrass Trapper enters, create an Incursion token. (It's a battle with 2 defense and "When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.")

card.name: Voyaging Podmate
card.text: {T}: Add {G} or {U}. {T}: Add {G}{U}. Spend this mana only to cast a Kraken, Octopus, Leviathan, or Serpent spell.

card.name: Shallows Assailant
card.text: Lure (This creature must be blocked if able.) {4}{G}{G}: Until end of turn, all creatures able to block Shallows Assailant do so.

card.name: Septech Visionary
card.text: Creatures you control with +1/+1 counters on them have trample. {1}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control that entered this turn.

card.name: Studied Archaeologist
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.")

card.name: Peregrine Merchant
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, create a token that's a copy of target token you control.

card.name: Caller of Great Greys
card.text: {2}{G}, {T}: Create a 3/2 red Shark creature token with haste. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Pitburrow Crab
card.text: Challenge (This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.) When Pitburrow Crab enters, create two Incursion tokens. (They're battles with 2 defense and "When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.")

card.name: Kraken's Spoils
card.text: Vigilance Sacrifice a token: Kraken's Spoils becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Scourge of Sails
card.text: Reach, trample When Scourge of Sails enters, destroy up to one target artifact, battle, enchantment, or land.

card.name: Guide from Beneath
card.text: Target creature you control gets +0/+8 and gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: New-Age Bioengineering
card.text: Whenever you put one or more +1/+1 counters on a creature you control, that creature innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time that creature is tapped.)

card.name: Throttled Salvo
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.")

card.name: Jolly Steamwheel
card.text: When Jolly Steamwheel enters, create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.") Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Traverse the Deepbrine
card.text: Return up to one target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped, then return up to one target creature card and up to one target Vehicle card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Valus Harbor Bugler
card.text: When Valus Harbor Bugler enters, add a 3/3 white Whale creature token with flying to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)

card.name: Decatech Forerigger
card.text: When Decatech Forerigger enters, create a 1/1 colorless Thopter creature token with flying. Whenever two or more creatures you control attack and aren't blocked, draw a card.

card.name: Crain's Chum
card.text: When Crain's Chum enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Exhaust — Tap any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 10 or greater: Put two +1/+1 counters on Crain's Chum and draw two cards. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Forgotten Selkie
card.text: Menace Whenever Forgotten Selkie attacks, you may sacrifice a Zombie that crewed it this turn. When you do, return target creature defending player controls to its owner's hand, then that player discards a card. Crew 4 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 4 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Shredsail Brigand
card.text: Ward—Discard a card. At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. It gains haste until end of turn and attacks this combat if able. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Blacksea Marauder
card.text: Raid — When Blacksea Marauder enters, exile the top two cards of target opponent's library. You may play those cards from exile until end of turn, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast those spells. If you attacked this turn, add {B}{B}{R}{R}.

card.name: Veilpost Broadcaster
card.text: When Veilpost Broadcaster enters, create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.") {T}, Tap an untapped permanent you control: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Trench Thresher
card.text: {R}{G}, {T}: Target attacking creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. {1}{R}{G}, {T}: Target creature must be blocked this turn if able.

card.name: Port Rose Authority
card.text: Vigilance When Port Rose Authority enters, create a Incursion token. (It's a battle with 2 defense and "When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.")

card.name: Snidd Wrangler
card.text: Whenever Snidd Wrangler attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature, then untap each creature you control with a counter on it. Those creatures gain challenge until end of turn. (They can't be blocked by more than one creature.)

card.name: Lymph Mechanist
card.text: Lifelink Whenever an artifact you control enters, you may pay 1 life. If you do, Lymph Mechanist innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.)

card.name: Drifting Workshop
card.text: Flying When Drifting Workshop enters, create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact token with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control." Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Triptech Investor
card.text: When Triptech Investor enters, create a Cog token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.") {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Triptech Investor. Activate only outside of combat.

card.name: Greensea Savage
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {3} or sacrifice two tokens. Reach When Greensea Savage enters, target opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Krill Seekers
card.text: When Krill Seekers enters, add an 8/8 blue Kraken creature token to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)

card.name: Journey Towards L'Or
card.text: Draw three cards, then you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. Create two 1/1 blue Fish creature tokens.

card.name: Bonny Lass
card.text: Menace Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on Bonny Lass, then surveil 1.

card.name: Ripsail Dragoon
card.text: Haste Whenever Ripsail Dragoon attacks, target creature that crewed it this turn innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Port Pearl Technician
card.text: When Port Pearl Technician enters, it innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.) Vehicles you control have agile. (They deal damage first while attacking.)

card.name: First Fleet Watchtower
card.text: When First Fleet Watchtower enters, create a 2/2 colorless Vehicle artifact tokens with flying and crew 1. {T}: Target Vehicle you control with crew 3 or less becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Aethersilt Collector
card.text: Flying Exhaust — {12}: Put three +1/+1 counters on Aethersilt Collector. Draw three cards. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each artifact you control. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Thunderball Mortars

card.name: Adventurer's Ensign
card.text: Flying Pilots and Pirates you control get +1/+1. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Glistening Cove
card.text: Shroud When Glistening Cove enters, exile another target land you control until Glistening Cove leaves the battlefield. {T}: Add two mana in any combination of types the exiled land could produce.

card.name: Finespun Whir
card.text: Create a 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature token with flying. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Spybrass Navigator
card.text: Whenever Spybrass Navigator becomes tapped, surveil 1.

card.name: Steadfast Deckhand
card.text: {3}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. • Destroy target creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Greaseworks Mutt
card.text: Greaseworks Mutt gets +1/+1 for each other artifact you control.

card.text: When Gizmotor Operator enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature or Vehicle you control. Whenever you attack, target creature you control with a counter on it gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.text: When Crain's Recruiter enters, create two 2/2 black Zombie creature tokens with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Benthic Soothsayer
card.text: Whenever a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Benthic Soothsayer and surveil 1.

card.name: Cloudtide Whale
card.text: Flying When Cloudtide Whale enters, add a 3/3 white Whale creature token with flying to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)

card.name: Slatescale Ancient
card.text: Flash When Slatescale Ancient enters, draw two cards, then discard two cards.

card.name: Shore Up
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains hexproof until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: Entangle
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent. Counter target spell unless its controller pays {8}.

card.name: Go Fish
card.text: Draw two cards. Create a 1/1 blue Fish creature token.

card.name: Gears to Gadgets
card.text: Surveil 2, then target creature you control innovates. (Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time that creature is tapped.)

card.name: Kelping Hand
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a blue Fish with base power and toughness 1/1. (It loses all other colors, card types, and creature types.)

card.name: Bathe in Bilge
card.text: The owner of target creature or Vehicle puts it on top or bottom of their library. Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Bateau-Chateau
card.text: Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.) Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Crunch
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it has flash if it targets a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent you control. Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Grand Entrance
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains reach and trample until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: Gold on the Horizon
card.text: Create a tapped colorless land token named Everywhere that is every basic land type. Surveil 2.

card.name: Bayou Excavator
card.text: When Bayou Excavator enters, look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a permanent card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Surveillance Station
card.text: Flying When Surveillance Station enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Governor's Enforcer
card.text: When Governor's Enforcer enters, destroy target nonland permanent an opponent controls. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Brassframe Assembler
card.text: When Brassframe Assembler enters, add a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact token with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control" to your bestiary. (If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)

card.name: Salvaged Anchor
Prismatic Surfcutter
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Hidden Grotto
card.text: When Hidden Grotto enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Whale SAS
card.text: Flying

card.name: Zombie SAS
card.text: Decayed (This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Shark SAS
card.text: Haste

card.name: Plant SAS
card.text: {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: Thopter SAS
card.text: Flying

card.name: Construct SAS
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.

card.name: Vehicle SAS
card.text: Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Vehicle SAS
card.text: Flying Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Cog SAS
card.text: Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.

card.name: Incursion SAS
card.text: When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.
